channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Two people critically injured after Secret Service shooting near the White House
item.description: Two people were critically injured after a shooting involving the U.S. Secret Service near the White House in Washington on Saturday evening. According to a law enforcement official speaking anonymous...

item.title: Daily Feng Shui Guide for May 24, 2026 by Master Hanz Cua
item.description: The article published by ABS-CBN Lifestyle features a brief daily feng shui reading attributed to Master Hanz Cua for May 24, 2026. It forms part of the platform’s regular lifestyle content that offer...

item.title: Ntuzuma court hands down life plus 45-year sentence to KwaZulu-Natal man for multiple murders and attempted murder
item.description: The Ntuzuma Regional Court in KwaZulu-Natal has sentenced Peterson Booysen to life imprisonment plus an additional 45 years after being convicted on three counts of murder and two counts of attempted ...

item.title: Canberra teacher describes years of illness and delayed diagnosis after developing long COVID
item.description: Canberra disability support teacher Chris Quill has spoken publicly about the severe impact long COVID has had on his life and family since first contracting COVID-19 in late 2022. Before becoming ill...

item.title: Sue Gray reportedly advising Andy Burnham amid growing Labour leadership speculation
item.description: According to a report by the Mail on Sunday, Sue Gray, the former chief of staff to Prime Minister Keir Starmer, is advising Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham as he prepares for a possible future ...

item.title: Paul McCartney praises Paul Mescal’s casting in upcoming Beatles biopics
item.description: Paul McCartney has offered a light-hearted endorsement of actor Paul Mescal, who will portray him in Sam Mendes’ upcoming Beatles biopic series. The project, titled The Beatles – A Four-Film Cinematic...

item.title: Reports of possible gunfire near the White House prompt security response
item.description: Law enforcement authorities in the United States have responded to reports of apparent gunshots being heard in the vicinity of the White House in Washington, D.C. The incident was reported early on Ma...

item.title: Morocco King Mohammed VI Pardons 15 Senegalese Fans Jailed After AFCON Final Violence
item.description: King Mohammed VI of Morocco don grant royal pardon to Senegalese football supporters wey dem jail after violence during the 2025 AFCON final for Rabat. According to statement from the royal court, the...

item.title: Retrial ordered after jury discharged in Ian Watkins prison murder case
item.description: The trial of two men accused of murdering former Lostprophets frontman Ian Watkins has been halted after the jury was discharged at Leeds Crown Court, with a retrial now scheduled. Mr Justice Hilliard...

item.title: PM Modi and US Secretary Marco Rubio discuss strengthening India-US strategic partnership and global cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi held discussions with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio in New Delhi, highlighting the continued strengthening of the India-US Comprehensive Global Strategic Partnership. ...

item.title: China launches Shenzhou-23 mission to support long-duration space research and 2030 moon landing plans
item.description: China is preparing to launch the Shenzhou-23 mission, sending three astronauts to the Tiangong space station as part of its broader effort to achieve a crewed moon landing by 2030. The spacecraft is s...

item.title: Reforming SAPS: moving towards intelligence-led and technology-driven policing
item.description: This opinion piece argues that South Africa’s policing crisis is not primarily about lack of funding or insufficient personnel, but rather a deeper structural and philosophical failure within the Sout...

item.title: Reflection on the Holy Spirit Coming Anew in Sunday Gospel
item.description: The article titled “A Word on the Word: The Spirit comes anew,” written by Fr. Raymund Benedict “RB” Hizon, SJ, is a reflective piece centred on the Sunday Gospel reading and its spiritual message. It...

item.title: Health authorities warn over hantavirus risks and Nigeria’s preparedness gaps amid global outbreak concerns
item.description: Health experts and global health bodies have raised concerns over increasing attention on Hantavirus infections and what it could mean for countries with weak sanitation systems, including Nigeria. Al...

item.title: A Look Back at 1950s Practical Motorist Magazine Covers and DIY Car Culture
item.description: The article from Vintage Everyday explores the history and cultural significance of the British magazine Practical Motorist, first published in 1934 by George Newnes. The magazine became a trusted res...

item.title: ABS-CBN Lifestyle Features 'Pansexual' as the Word of the Day for May 24, 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN Lifestyle published its “Word of the Day” feature on May 24, 2026, highlighting the term “pansexual.” The short lifestyle entry forms part of the media company’s regular educational and vocabu...

item.title: Photograph of Norman Lindsay and Rose Soady Highlights Their Artistic Partnership in Early 20th-Century Australia
item.description: A historical article published by Vintage Everyday revisits a rare circa-1909 photograph of Australian artist Norman Lindsay and his wife and muse, Rose Soady, taken by Norman’s brother Lionel Lindsay...

item.title: House prosecution panel opposes online voting in impeachment proceedings
item.description: A spokesperson for the House prosecution panel stressed that senators must be physically present during impeachment proceedings, describing the responsibility as a “sacred duty” that requires full att...

item.title: Divorce lawyer explains warning signs of ‘silent divorce’ and emotional disconnection in relationships
item.description: Family lawyer Gabriella Pomare, drawing on more than a decade of experience in family law, highlights a growing phenomenon she describes as a “silent divorce” or “quiet quitting” within relationships....

item.title: Tobi Amusan Finishes Second in Xiamen Diamond League with Season’s Best Performance
item.description: Nigeria’s top hurdler, Tobi Amusan, delivered a strong performance at the Xiamen Diamond League after she finished second in the women’s 100m hurdles event. The current world record holder crossed the...
